sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Current board has 15 green blocks at various positions
# Target cols: 15, 21, 27
# Non-target cols: 33, 39, 45, 51
# Remove only non-target green blocks

seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
green = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'N']

target_cols = {15, 21, 27}
non_target = []
for g in green:
    b = g['boundary']
    cc = (min(c for r,c in b) + max(c for r,c in b)) // 2
    cr = (min(r for r,c in b) + max(r for r,c in b)) // 2
    if cc not in target_cols:
        non_target.append((cr, cc))

print(f"Non-target green blocks: {non_target}")

# Remove all non-target green blocks
for r, c in non_target:
    result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': r, 'col': c}])
    print(f"After ({r}, {c}): level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}, game_over={last_action_result.get('game_over')}")
    if last_action_result.get('level_completed') or last_action_result.get('game_over'):
        break

# Check state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
green = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'N']
print(f"\nRemaining green: {len(green)}")
for g in green:
    b = g['boundary']
    cc = (min(c for r,c in b) + max(c for r,c in b)) // 2
    cr = (min(r for r,c in b) + max(r for r,c in b)) // 2
    print(f"  Green at ({cr}, {cc})")

player = next(n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'b')
b = player['boundary']
cc = (min(c for r,c in b) + max(c for r,c in b)) // 2
cr = (min(r for r,c in b) + max(r for r,c in b)) // 2
print(f"Player at ({cr}, {cc})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
